rationale: Builds directly on the winning soft quant-aware projection ramp, but fixes a mismatch it still leaves behind: late roundtrip snaps mutate projection weights while Muon momentum for those matrices still points at the pre-snap manifold. This run resets only projection-matrix Muon buffers after each quant-aware roundtrip, preserving the current throughput, quantizer, and LR schedule while letting the most quantization-sensitive weights settle toward the exact final int8 target instead of being pushed back by stale momentum.
title: Projection-Momentum Reset On Quant-Aware Snaps
